summary: Meterplan exposes two public integration surfaces: a no-auth MCP server at https://meterplan.com/mcp and a public REST/OpenAPI API at https://meterplan.com/openapi.json (plus a second public OpenAPI spec for the Smart Meter Texas endpoint at https://meterplan.com/openapi/smt.yaml).

surfaces.name: Meter Energy Smart Meter Texas Data API
